name: @dragonfruit/mcp-server
description: xmcp server exposing Dragon Fruit workspace tools

scripts.check:format: oxfmt --check package.json README.md tsconfig.json xmcp.config.ts src scripts
scripts.fix:format: oxfmt package.json README.md tsconfig.json xmcp.config.ts src scripts
scripts.clean: rm -rf .turbo && rm -rf .next && rm -rf node_modules && rm -rf dist
